wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Electric Shrymp|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Enchant|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Imbued|2}}
{{R|Electric Shrymp||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relic}}. Upon pickup, you choose a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} to {{KW|Enchant||2}} with {{KW|Imbued||2}}, making it automatically played for free at the start of each combat.

After being played, the card will go into your Discard Pile, or {{KW|Exhaust||2}} if it has {{KW|Exhaust||2}}.

== Obtaining Electric Shrymp ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 2|Act 2}}, can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Electric Shrimp''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Glass Eye||2}}, {{R|Sand Castle||2}}, {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}}, and {{R|Sea Glass||2}}, only 1 of the 5 can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
* The {{KW|Imbued||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} will be played after other start-of-combat effects occur such as {{R|Toolbox||2}} and {{R|Anchor||2}}, and after drawing cards on your first turn.
** The {{KW|Imbued||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} is forced to start combat at the bottom of your Draw Pile, so you cannot usually 'waste' a draw on it (unless you draw your whole Draw Pile).

=== Synergies ===

* Strong but expensive skills like {{C|Royal Gamble||2}}, {{C|Nightmare||2}} or {{C|Decisions, Decisions||2}} benefit significantly from being played instantly for free.
===Neutral===
*X-cost {{QueryLink|Cards|type:skill|Skills|2}} such as {{C|Malaise||2}} take into account the current value of X (influenced by {{R|Chemical X||2}}) but do not consume any energy.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Electric Shrymp to the game.
